name: Phantom link
description: Alice, a young professional, is tricked into clicking a phishing email, only to find herself trapped in a terrifying cyber-extortion scheme. The hacker, an unseen digital menace, has taken control of her computer, webcam, and financial data. Forced into a twisted game of obedience, Alice must outsmart her invisible tormentor before her life is destroyed. With no one to turn to, she must rely on her wits, a mysterious ally within the hacker’s network, and the secrets buried in her own past.
creator: D@n
